task: It seems that most of my notifications for sisyphus aren't going through the swift app notificatino system. For example, I'm not seeing notification triggered when orchestrator or agents stop (waiting for input). It'd also be great to get notifications when the orchestrator starts in a new mode, for example.

agents.name: impl-notifications

reports.summary: Added terminal notifications at 4 session lifecycle points (completion, cycle start, all agents done, paused) with tmux click-to-switch support.

agents.resumeEnv: export SISYPHUS_SESSION_ID='57a8d3c1-ac1e-4a61-ad82-c368ed14fc23' && export SISYPHUS_AGENT_ID='agent-001' && export SISYPHUS_CWD='/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/sisyphus' && export SISYPHUS_SESSION_DIR='/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/sisyphus/.sisyphus/sessions/57a8d3c1-ac1e-4a61-ad82-c368ed14fc23' && export PATH="/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/.bin:$PATH"

orchestratorCycles.resumeEnv: export SISYPHUS_SESSION_ID='57a8d3c1-ac1e-4a61-ad82-c368ed14fc23' && export SISYPHUS_AGENT_ID='orchestrator' && export SISYPHUS_CWD='/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/sisyphus' && export SISYPHUS_SESSION_DIR='/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/sisyphus/.sisyphus/sessions/57a8d3c1-ac1e-4a61-ad82-c368ed14fc23' && export PATH="/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/.bin:$PATH" && export SISYPHUS_NOTIFY_ENABLED='1' && export SISYPHUS_NOTIFY_SOUND='/System/Library/Sounds/Hero.aiff' && export SISYPHUS_SESSION_NAME='57a8d3c1'
orchestratorCycles.nextPrompt: Review agent-001 report on notification implementation. Verify the changes look correct: all 4 notification points added, config gated, build passes. If clean, transition to validation.

orchestratorCycles.resumeEnv: export SISYPHUS_SESSION_ID='57a8d3c1-ac1e-4a61-ad82-c368ed14fc23' && export SISYPHUS_AGENT_ID='orchestrator' && export SISYPHUS_CWD='/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/sisyphus' && export SISYPHUS_SESSION_DIR='/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/sisyphus/.sisyphus/sessions/57a8d3c1-ac1e-4a61-ad82-c368ed14fc23' && export PATH="/Users/silasrhyneer/Code/claude-tools/.bin:$PATH" && export SISYPHUS_NOTIFY_ENABLED='1' && export SISYPHUS_NOTIFY_SOUND='/System/Library/Sounds/Hero.aiff' && export SISYPHUS_SESSION_NAME='sisyphus-notification-system-f'
